title: tzdata bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[2025c-1.0.1]
- Use javac 1.6 or newer

[2025c-1]
- Update to tzdata-2025c (RHEL-135159)
  - Update leap seconds file expiration date

[2025b-2]
- Included NEWS file with docs. (RHEL-102379)
full_text:
[2025c-1.0.1]
- Use javac 1.6 or newer

[2025c-1]
- Update to tzdata-2025c (RHEL-135159)
  - Update leap seconds file expiration date

[2025b-2]
- Included NEWS file with docs. (RHEL-102379)
